glosses.vi: huấn luyện viên; người hướng dẫn
glosses.ja: コーチ; トレーナー

sentences.target: Mein Trainer ruft mich vor dem Spiel.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈtʁeːnɐ ʁuːft mɪç foːɐ̯ deːm ʃpiːl/

translations.de: Mein Trainer ruft mich vor dem Spiel.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈtʁeːnɐ ʁuːft mɪç foːɐ̯ deːm ʃpiːl/
translations.en: My coach calls me before the game.
translations.es: El entrenador me llama antes del partido.
translations.fr: Le coach m'appelle avant le match.
translations.it: L'allenatore mi chiama prima della partita.
translations.pt: O treinador me chama antes do jogo.
translations.vi: Huấn luyện viên gọi tôi trước trận đấu.
translations.nl: De coach roept me voor de wedstrijd.
translations.hu: Az edző odaszól nekem a meccs előtt.
translations.hi: कोच मैच से पहले मुझे बुलाता है.
translations.el: Ο προπονητής μου φωνάζει πριν από τον αγώνα.
translations.nb: Treneren roper på meg før kampen.
translations.sv: Tränaren ropar på mig före matchen.
translations.ro: Antrenorul mă strigă înainte de meci.
translations.cs: Trenér na mě volá před zápasem.
translations.da: Træneren råber på mig før kampen.
translations.ja: コーチが試合前に私を呼ぶ。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner in nominative masculine singular; modifies the subject noun 'Trainer'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; main predicate selecting an accusative object ('mich').
Personal pronoun, accusative singular 1st person; direct object of 'ruft'.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces temporal PP 'vor dem Spiel'.
Definite article, dative singular (neuter here); determiner of 'Spiel' in the PP.
Neuter noun; object of the preposition 'vor' in dative singular.

sentences.target: Ich treffe gleich meinen Trainer im Park.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈtʁɛfə ɡlaɪ̯ç maɪ̯nən ˈtʁeːnɐ ɪm paʁk/

translations.de: Ich treffe gleich meinen Trainer im Park.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈtʁɛfə ɡlaɪ̯ç maɪ̯nən ˈtʁeːnɐ ɪm paʁk/
translations.en: I'm meeting my trainer in the park soon.
translations.es: Enseguida me reúno con mi entrenador en el parque.
translations.fr: Je retrouve mon coach au parc tout à l'heure.
translations.it: Tra poco incontro il mio allenatore al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我一会儿要在公园见我的教练。
translations.yue: 我一陣喺公園同教練見面。
translations.ru: Я скоро встречусь с тренером в парке.
translations.pt: Daqui a pouco vou me encontrar com o meu treinador no parque.
translations.he: אני נפגש עם המאמן בפארק עוד מעט.
translations.vi: Tí nữa tôi sẽ gặp huấn luyện viên của mình ở công viên.
translations.ar: سألتقي مدربي في الحديقة بعد قليل.
translations.nl: Ik ontmoet zo mijn trainer in het park.
translations.uk: Я скоро зустрінуся з тренером у парку.
translations.hu: Mindjárt találkozom az edzőmmel a parkban.
translations.hi: मैं जल्द ही पार्क में अपने ट्रेनर से मिलूँगा.
translations.pl: Wkrótce spotkam się z trenerem w parku.
translations.el: Σε λίγο θα συναντήσω τον προπονητή μου στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Jeg skal snart møte treneren min i parken.
translations.id: Sebentar lagi saya akan bertemu dengan pelatih saya di taman.
translations.sv: Snart ska jag träffa min tränare i parken.
translations.ro: În curând mă întâlnesc cu antrenorul meu în parc.
translations.cs: Za chvíli se sejdu s trenérem v parku.
translations.da: Jeg mødes snart med min træner i parken.
translations.ja: もうすぐ公園でトレーナーと会う。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular 1st person; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present indicative; transitive predicate.
Temporal adverb modifying 'treffe'.
Possessive determiner, accusative masculine singular; modifies 'Trainer' (direct object).
Masculine noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'treffe'.
Contracted preposition ('in dem'); governs the dative to form a locative PP.
Masculine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'.

sentences.target: Der Trainer zeigt mir eine bessere Haltung.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈtʁeːnɐ tsaɪ̯kt miːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈbɛsəʁə ˈhaltʊŋ/

translations.de: Der Trainer zeigt mir eine bessere Haltung.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈtʁeːnɐ tsaɪ̯kt miːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈbɛsəʁə ˈhaltʊŋ/
translations.en: The coach shows me a better posture.
translations.es: El entrenador me muestra una mejor postura.
translations.fr: Le coach me montre une meilleure posture.
translations.it: L'allenatore mi mostra una postura migliore.
translations.zh-Hans: 教练给我示范一个更好的姿势。
translations.yue: 教練向我示範一個更好嘅姿勢。
translations.ru: Тренер показывает мне более правильную осанку.
translations.pt: O treinador me mostra uma postura melhor.
translations.he: המאמן מראה לי יציבה טובה יותר.
translations.tr: Antrenör bana daha iyi bir duruş gösteriyor.
translations.vi: Huấn luyện viên chỉ cho tôi tư thế tốt hơn.
translations.nl: De coach laat me een betere houding zien.
translations.hu: Az edző megmutat nekem egy jobb tartást.
translations.hi: कोच मुझे बेहतर मुद्रा दिखाता है.
translations.el: Ο προπονητής μου δείχνει καλύτερη στάση σώματος.
translations.nb: Treneren viser meg en bedre holdning.
translations.id: Pelatih menunjukkan postur yang lebih baik kepada saya.
translations.sv: Tränaren visar mig en bättre hållning.
translations.ro: Antrenorul îmi arată o postură mai bună.
translations.cs: Trenér mi ukazuje lepší držení těla.
translations.da: Træneren viser mig en bedre kropsholdning.
translations.ja: コーチがより良い姿勢を教えてくれる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; ditransitive, selecting a dative ('mir') and an accusative ('eine bessere Haltung').
Personal pronoun, dative singular 1st person; indirect object (recipient).
Indefinite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of the direct object NP.
Comparative adjective in attributive position; feminine accusative singular; modifies 'Haltung'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object (theme) of 'zeigt'.

sentences.target: Unsere Mannschaft hört dem Trainer zu.

translations.de: Unsere Mannschaft hört dem Trainer zu.
translations.en: Our team listens to the coach.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们的球队在听教练说话。
translations.yue: 我哋球隊喺度聽教練講嘢。
translations.vi: Đội của chúng tôi đang lắng nghe huấn luyện viên.
translations.nl: Ons team luistert naar de coach.
translations.hi: हमारी टीम कोच की बात सुनती है.
translations.el: Η ομάδα μας ακούει τον προπονητή.
translations.ro: Echipa noastră îl ascultă pe antrenor.
translations.ja: 私たちのチームはコーチの話を聞いている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Feminine noun, nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; main verb of the separable construction 'zuhören', governing a dative object.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of 'Trainer' (dative object of 'zuhören').
Masculine noun, dative singular; addressee (object) of 'zuhören'.
Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'zuhören'; appears at clause end.
